items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to 'Sync back to main booking system', but there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this functionality has been implemented or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for this sync, yet lacks specific evidence of its status or successful execution. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence.
